# interlink_products (Data Source)

Fetches the Inter.link product catalog.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `products` (Attributes List) All products available in the catalog. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--products))

<a id="nestedatt--products"></a>
### Nested Schema for `products`

Read-Only:

- `id` (Number) Internal numeric product ID.
- `name` (String) Product name (e.g. `Cloud Connect`).
- `pid` (String) Product identifier (e.g. `PID25`).
